title: NoVpn
description: A free, light-weight anti-vpn plugin for velocity, bungeecord and bukkit.
body:
# **NoVpn**
A free, light-weight anti-vpn plugin for velocity, bungeecord and bukkit.


This plugin was made to detect users that have a VPN very fast.
### Here are some features included in the plugin:
- Detects VPNs on join.
- Bungeecord, Velocity and Bukkit support.
- Configuration included.
- Completely open source [view here](https://github.com/aabssmc/NoVpn).

If you have any questions or need support join my discord server [here]('https://discord.gg/PUb887ymgs')!
